response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development with multiple languages and frameworks, but lacks direct experience with C++ on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle, and capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge. Their recent work is primarily in Node.js, TypeScript, and other non-C++ technologies, which does not align with the mandatory C++ development requirement. While their background includes some C/C++ experience, it is not recent or focused enough for this role.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with diverse language experience
Proven ability to work in agile and CI/CD environments
Demonstrated problem-solving and system design skills across multiple domains
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development on Windows platform (mandatory skill)
No domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
